title: distance_concordance
description: Multi-scale sample-pair concordance from C01m. For a candidate (chrom-wide computation subset to interval), reports for each tested distance d ∈ {80, 160, 320, 640 windows (configurable)} how persistent the sample-pair co-grouping is. Biologically, inversion-carrier pairs maintain co-grouping at all distances (recombination suppressed); family-LD pairs decay. The persistence profile is diagnostic of inversion vs family structure.

per_distance_summary.description: One entry per tested distance with aggregate concordance stats inside the candidate interval.

n_pairs_decaying.description: pairs with concordance dropping >0.3 vs shortest distance

persistent_carriers.description: Samples whose pairwise co-grouping persists across all tested distances → likely inversion carriers.

decaying_pairs_count.description: Number of sample pairs with concordance decaying across distances (likely family LD, not inversion).

inversion_vs_family_score.description: Summary score in [0,1]. 1 = strong inversion-carrier signal (persistent pairs dominate). 0 = family-LD signal dominates.
